category_sources: Official Gargoyle wiki describes Fon Flash as a program for flashing La Fonera and Atheros chipset compatible devices.
source_facts.description says fon-flash-cli flashes La Fonera and Atheros chipset compatible devices.
display_name_sources: Homebrew id and executable identify the CLI package as fon-flash-cli/fon-flash.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Gargoyle Wiki documentation page for Fon Flash.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/ericpaulbishop/gargoyle, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Gargoyle wiki says Fon Flash can flash Gargoyle/OpenWrt, Fon NG, and DD-WRT firmware.
source_facts.description identifies router/device flashing for La Fonera and Atheros devices.
